channel.title: Typia Blog
channel.description: Engineering notes, releases, and deep dives from Typia.

item.title: Function Calling Harness: From 6.75% to 100%
item.description: 6.75% first-try function calling success becomes 100% compilation via type schemas, compilers, and structured feedback. Dissecting the harness engineering behind AutoBe and Typia.
